column2: Quest failed. Will automatically restart in a few moments.
Quest failed. Teleport out to try again.
You must first complete all preceding quests.
You must first complete at least one preceding quest.
[Your quest item space is full. Make room for more quest items by turning some in.]
Meet Legate Troius at the Velika Travel Control Office.
Speak to Adela at the pegasus platform.
Speak to Klaon in the refugee camp.
Gather artful gracebloom across the northern bridge from Lumbertown.
Take the potion to a sick refugee.
Offer the potion to a sick refugee.
Offer the potion to a sick refugee.
How does this make you feel?
Offer the potion to a sick refugee.
Deliver potion to Verus at the Woodcutter Palisade.
Deliver the graceblooms to Maon at his cabin.
Take the gracebloom essence to Lillix at Faevine Vale Camp.
Defeat Seravy, then meet him at the Faerie Pond.
Take the unicorn tear to Volos.
Speak to Klaon at Aron's Camp.
Deliver the sealed scroll to Arcanist Klaon at Aron's Camp.
Deliver the sealed scroll to Arcanist Klaon at Aron's Camp.
Another Test for the Worthy Gunner [Bonus]
Defeat Nightmare RK-9 in RK-9 Kennel (Hard) and Nightmare Lachelith in Ruinous Manor (Hard) once each.
And tell him, "No excuses this time."
I sure hope you can help.
Deliver bridge repair tools to Weldon at Woodcutter Palisade.
That's a lot of timber. Thanks.
Gather the cut timber from the stacks near Woodcutter Palisade.
Deliver the cut timber to Weldon at the Woodcutter Palisade.
This well feed a lot of people.
Deliver the meat to Audburn at the Woodcutter Palisade.
Use the salt on the meat to cure it.
Now we've plenty to eat, and plenty to put up for later.
Go to Centurion Verus at the Woodcutter Palisade.
Use the barrel and salt to cure the meat.
Deliver the salted meat to Einna.
Reindal should have some ideas that will help.
I'm glad you're here. We need the help.
Go to Reindal at Maon's Cabin.
Don't make any promises you can't keep, though.
Chat with Phonon and then talk to Maon.
Talk to Maon to see how you can help.
Use pheremone darts to tame piglings and lead them to Maon.
It's a game of tag...with faeries.
Hunt the faeries near Maon's Cabin to recover Phonon's faerie dust.
Bring the faerie dust back to Phonon.
Hunt slinking sabertooths near Maon's cabin.
Hunt the slinking sabertooths and collect their teeth.
Meet Balter at the deserted homestead.
Thanks for coming to help me.
Meet Balter at the deserted homestead.
Hunt nearby centaurs and centaur insurgents.
Now I can fell some trees.
Hunt the centaurs and centaur insurgents for their manes.
Kill the faeries that are interfering with lumbering.
Now I can get back to work.
Thank you for avenging my father.
Kill Likhan the centaur in the southwestern part of the Fey Forest.
Report to Serra at the deserted homestead.
Deliver the tools to Siravon at the bridge near Faevine Vale.
Thanks to the tools you brought, I can do some work now.
Deliver the tools to Siravon at the bridge near Faevine Vale.
Collect cloud mushrooms at Faevine Vale.
Deliver the mushrooms to Hemming at the Faevine Vale Camp.
Get my bridge parts back from those redcaps!
Retrieve the bridge parts from the redcaps.
Deliver the bridge parts to Niklas at the Faevine Vale Camp.
Something must be done about the rampaging faeries!
It's better this way, but still sad.
Eliminate the faeries around the Faevine Vale Camp and collect their swords.
Go take out some hulking sabertooths.
Hunt hulking sabertooths around Faevine Vale Camp.
Report to Teroz at Faevine Vale Camp.
Thank you for coming here to tell us.
Meet the faeries at the Faerie Pond.
It hurts to see their spirits corrupted.
End the suffering of the sullen and feral unicorns and collect their horns.
Deliver the unicorn horns to Aeir.
I did what needed to be done.
Talk with Nemir at Aron's Camp.
Go to Nemir at Aron's Camp to the west.
Find Jerelyn in the forest to the southwest.
Hunt sporewalkers and terron lunatics until you recover Jerelyn's Necklace.
Hunt sporewalkers and terrons for the seals they carry.
Gather seals from the remains of sporewalkers and terrons.
Deliver the seals to Kadhim at Aron's Camp.
Teleport to the Woodland Path and escort Himir to safety across the bridge.
The tree behind me is the World Tree!
The World Tree and the Tower of Shara are the two pillars of this world.
I want this world's Zolyn to smile more often.
I'm happy just to watch her from a distance like this.
Hunt slinking sabertooths in the Fey Forest.
Defeat centaurs in the Fey Forest.
Report to Zandra in Lumbertown when mission is complete.
We need you to gather some rather...specialized materials.
Gather the materials necessary to craft an Ancient Scroll!
Gather the indicated materials and recieve a random reward chest!
Talk to Neacal about your new weapon.
Find Chama east of Bulwark Camp in Oblivion Woods.
Kill devan brigands and rescue Kantusa.
Are you sure? Tell me what happened.
Talk to Kantusa at the rendezvous.
Don't try to talk. We'll patch you up.
There's a lot to do from here on.
Say hello to Ferus in Crescentia for Dougal.
Use the teleportal to go to Bulwark Camp in Oblivion Woods.
Report to Neacal at Bulwark Camp in Oblivion Woods.
Don't worry. I'll take care of it.
Gather Sorrow Flowers. [Press key to open inventory and right-click the Crude Sickle to improve your gathering speed.]
Press to open inventory and find Getty's Teleportal Scroll to use.
Speak with the Magistrate and gather information.
I can take care of it.
Gather Sorrow Flowers. [Press key to open inventory and right-click the Crude Sickle to improve your gathering speed.]
Deliver the Sorrow Flowers and medicine to Neacal.
Come on, soldier. The centurion's watching...
Give the wounded soldier some medicine.
Come on, soldier. The centurion's watching...
Give the medicine to the other wounded soldier.
Report to Uriela at Valkyon Federation Headquarters.
Arrived at Bulwark Camp in Oblivion Woods
Press to open inventory and find Teleportal Scroll: Bulwark Camp in Oblivion Woods to use.
Report to Neacal at Bulwark Camp in Oblivion Woods.
Don't worry. I'll take care of it.
Gather Sorrow Flowers. [Press key to open inventory and right-click the Crude Sickle to improve your gathering speed.]
Give the wounded soldier the Sorrow Flower poultice.
Come on, soldier. The centurion's watching...
Give the other wounded soldier the Sorrow Flower poultice.
Come on, soldier. The centurion's watching...
Kill Devan Ruffians and retrieve Stolen Money Bags.
Find Chama east of Bulwark Camp in Oblivion Woods.
Kill Agitated Sporewalkers on your way to Crescentia.
Speak to Justarius at the entrance to Crescentia.
It's that white tent! Right over there!

Select a Keener Conscript and follow him.
[Protect Keener Conscript and don't let him die.]
Go to the place where Secret Agents managed to infiltrate.
Destroy vortex shards in the Devan Encampment.
Talk to Kamia, hidden in the bush.
Clear the escape route by defeating devas.
We'll have to look for her.
What do devas want with federation money anyway?
Recover the stolen money bags from the devas in Blood Run.
Return the money bags to Foledus at Bulwark Camp.
I'm going broke without my merchandise!
Thanks. You've saved me a lot of money.
Time to find a new shop.
Go to the Brigand's Den in Blood Run and search the chests for stolen valuables.
Deliver the threads to Neacal at Bulwark Camp.
I'm sure the town and the peddlers would both be grateful.
Supplies bolster morale more than you know.
Thank you! I would have never made it without you.
Find the peddler along the eastern road and escort him to Crescentia.
Speak to Justarius at the entrance to Crescentia.
Ask Esedran, near the cemetary, about Ohdi.
Speak to Esedran near Berzerad Cemetery.
That should keep him busy for a while.
Collect sacred bones from the undead in Berzerad Cemetery.
I'm glad to be of service.
I've heard good things about you. Some might even be true.
Report to Hendry at the Vanguard Outpost.
I never cared much for sporewalkers anyway.
Collect spores from the agitated sporewalkers wandering around Berzerad Cemetery.
Find Timuron, hiding in Berzerad Cemetery.
Find Timuron, hiding in Berzerad Cemetery.
Deliver the undead compound to Neria at the Vanguard Outpost.
Their deaths will cripple the devas' efforts.
How dare you interrupt our ritual?
Hunt down reavers of resurrection and ebonheart sorcerers in Deva Silva and bring back their hearts.
Report to Hendry at the Vanguard Outpost.
These contain dark power! They'll be very useful.
Kill Kulsilva, the sporewalkers, and the arcanists in Deva Silva and collect their amulets.
Bring the amulets back to Pholus.
Droyan needs all the help he can get.
Head deep into Deva Silva and find Droyan.
Head northeast and find Parlan in Bestial Vale.
An Elegant Weapon from a More Civilized Empire
Watch your step with those devas.
I'll put these to good use.
Collect weapons from devan blademasters, brigands, and scrappers deep inside Deva Silva.
Droyan and I found these weapons.
Let's see how they like being burgled for once.
Liberate devan brigand Supplies from Deva Silva.
Find Rasima, currently hiding in Deva Silva, and bring her some water.
Find Keleth's corpse in Deva Silva.
Sure you can carry all that?
Deliver the field package to Hendry at the Vanguard Outpost.
More eggs for us, fewer for them.
Maybe we can find a use for these besides big omelets.
Collect basilisk eggs from the Bestial Vale.
Find a basilisk victim's corpse in the Bestial Vale.
Only the really best eyes, mind.
Collect pristine eyeballs from basilisks in the Bestial Vale.
Bring me some Ghilliedhu Root before Parlan kicks my ass.
Collect roots from ghilliedhus in the Bestial Vale.
Show those devas a thing or two.
Follow the road northeast from Lumbertown and report to Neacal at the Bulwark Camp.
Eliminate the devas in Blood Run and retrieve the stolen cargo.
Report to Jalize in Crescentia when mission is complete.
Eliminate the undead in Berzerad Cemetery.
Report to Jalize in Crescentia when mission is complete.
Hunt the devas in Deva Silva.
Report to Jalize in Crescentia when mission is complete.
Cull the ghilliedhus in Bestial Vale.
Report to Jalize in Crescentia when mission is complete.
Report to Jalize in Crescentia when mission is complete.
Report to Jalize in Crescentia when mission is complete.
Speak to Aarinia near the entrance to Fyrmount.
Use the Firebase Valor Teleport Scroll and go to Elleon at Firebase Valor in northern Fyrmount.
Kill Jirakar at Bahaar's Maw and retrieve Akasha's orders.
Tell Elleon that you are ready.

Use the {@LinkCreature:204#1124#Teleportal} to go to Fyrmount Abyss and join with {@LinkCreature:403#1103#Elleon}.&#xA[You can proceed by selecting "I am ready." after speaking with {@LinkCreature:403#1103#Elleon} in Fyrmount Abyss.]

Use the {@LinkCreature:204#1124#Teleportal} to go to Fyrmount Abyss and join with {@LinkCreature:403#1103#Elleon}.&#xA[You can proceed by selecting "I am ready." after speaking with {@LinkCreature:403#1103#Elleon} in Fyrmount Abyss.]
Protect {@LinkCreature:403#1108#The Core} from Akasha's attack.&#xA[You can proceed by selecting "We'll be fine." after speaking with {@LinkCreature:403#1108#The Core} in Fyrmount Abyss.]
Return to Castanica and speak with Fraya.
Collect durignite from the residents of Castanica.
Speak with Dada at Cauldron Outpost about the shortage of durignite.
Investigate the Delthin Mine in the western Brimstone Highlands.
Investigate the dead miners around the Tansin Mine.
Investigate the Tansin Mine north of the Delthin Mine.
Retrieve the miners' belongings around the Tansin Mine.
Return the belongings to Dada at Cauldron Outpost.
Return the belongings to Dada at Cauldron Outpost.
Kill the devan war golems and fallen devan protectors and retrieve the durignite.
Return the durignite to Dada at Cauldron Outpost.
Inform the residents of Castanica that the miner problems have been resolved.
We're Castanica's last line of defense!
Find Aarinia at Cauldron Outpost in southeastern Fyrmount.
Talk to Keinie at Cauldron Outpost.
I wouldn't take on a fangspawn alone, but that's just me.
You're sure living up to your reputation!
Slay the fangspawns in the Brimstone Highlands and collect their hearts.
Deliver the hearts to Aarinia at Cauldron Outpost.
The sulphur is quite cleansing. Stinky, but cleansing.
I know that wasn't easy. You have my thanks.
Kill the sulphurous groknars and collect the essence.
Deliver the essences to Larusia at Cauldron Outpost.
We have enough things trying to kill us.
Things could be worse. There could be gulas.
Kill the sooty sporewalkers and smoldering ghilliedhus in the Brimstone Highlands.
Do something about those wolves. The howling is making me crazy!
Hear that silence? Wonderful, isn't it?
Cull the ashstalker wolves in the Brimstone Highlands.
Return to Kridan at Cauldron Outpost.
And we can melt these down and use them.
Kill the devan war golems and fallen devan protectors near the Delthin Mine for their shadmetal armor.
Send those cursed undead back to the Dream where they belong!
Kill the devan dark knights and risen devan infantry and collect their tokens.
Report back to Aarinia at Cauldron Outpost.
We all have our rituals, don't we? Even soldiers.
Though they fell in battle, their courage lives on.
Sprinkle holy water on the bodies of the dead soldiers in the western Brimstone Highlands.
Sprinkle holy water on the bodies of the dead soldiers in the western Brimstone Highlands.
Sprinkle holy water on the bodies of the dead soldiers in the western Brimstone Highlands.
Return to Larusia at Cauldron Outpost.
Watch yourself out there. Things get worse, not better.
Make your way to Firebase Intrepid and report in.
That is one big heart. Is it steaming?
Hunt down the fangspawns in the Blazing Vale and collect their hearts.
Waiting for the Hammer to Fall
Teach those shurians the folly of crossing us!
Defeat the shurian foe-hammers in the Blazing Vale.
Report back to Ravilyn at Firebase Intrepid.
This is a mission of mercy!
We owe you a great debt. Thanks.
Hunt down eldritch cardinals and collect their bones.
With those reavers gone, we can hold our own.
Hunt down and destroy the eldritch reavers in the Blazing Vale.
Flamewood's darned useful stuff. Tough, too.
This will do nicely! Looks hot.
Collect flamewood from the raging arbosks.
Marakadi's death will send a message.
I'll need to update my report to Castanica.
Find Marakadi in the western edge of Blazing Vale and kill her. Take any clues or tools she carries.
Use the fiery key on the Cruental Pylon.
We are short of {@RawItem:206807} right now.
This is a good start. I'll get to work.
Shina'll have plenty of work for you.
Ready to take on some shurians?
Report to Shina at Firebase Valor.
I'll be damned if we're giving ground to the shurians!
Eliminate the shurian menace around Molten Reach.
Report back to Shina at Firebase Valor.
Soulstalkers are the bane of my existence!
I can't tell you how glad I am that they're dead.
Slay the soulstalkers in Molten Reach and collect their crests.
Tyraks are the creepiest things I've ever faced.
Is there anything you can't do?
Hunt down the tyraks in Molten Reach.
We need to hit the shurians where it counts.
That will put a crimp in their plans.
Confiscate focus mirrors from shurian mindbenders and their imps.
Fyrmount's full of unique ores—all of them useful.
Find flamelicked ore on the ground near the entrance to Molten Reach.
Deliver flamelicked ore to Eurice at Firebase Valor.
We must destroy the bloodshard if it exists.
Destroy the smoldering bloodshard near the Forge of Fury.
Report to Calram at Firebase Intrepid.
Decided to go to the underground with Syona.
Go to the castle grounds with Randun.
Hunt down the interlopers in the Brimstone Highlands.
Report to Keinie at Cauldron Outpost.
Hunt down fangspawns and sulphurous groknars.
Report to Keinie at Cauldron Outpost.
Eliminate the shurians, eldritch reavers and berserkers, and raging arbosks.
Report to Keinie at Cauldron Outpost.
Report to Helone at Firebase Intrepid.
Report to Tifane at Firebase Valor.
Report to Tifane at Firebase Valor.
Kill tyraks, shurian mindbenders, and their thralls.
Report to Tifane at Firebase Valor.
Report to Tifane at Firebase Valor.
Visit tuwangi runaway Tomba in Lumbertown.
Teleport to Tuwangi Mire via Tomba and meet Rathe.
You could be a big help to the tuwangis.
It's only a crisis to those crazy tuwangis.
Teleport to Tuwangi Mire Marshlands via Batooni and meet with Tribune Rathe.
If I never see another sporewalker...
Couldn't have done it without you.
Kill the hungry cullars and the tentacullars in the eastern part of Marshlands.
Please find me some quagmire herbs to make nostrum.
Find quagmire herbs in the eastern part of Marshlands.
Boermas will be grateful for any help.
Find Boermas in Babok Hollow, past the Mire entrance cave.
Kill the garangkas the tuwangi overseers ride.
Bring the eyeballs back to Boermas.
Thank you, thank you, thank you!
Recover Boermas's wares from his luggage near Tuwangi Thorp.
Kill the Tuwangi Workers in their village and collect the headdresses.
Retrieve the lovely trinket from Warchief Bauba.
You helped my brother. Thank you!
Hunt the inky sabertooths near the center of Tuwangi Mire.
Moong is no match for you!
Kill the Tuwangi Warfroggers in Mighty Frog Pond to the southwest and collect order-inscribed tablets.
Deliver the order-inscribed tablets to Pangari in Shaman's Shelter.
The Stonehammers aren't very nice. Trust me.
Kill Stonehammer tuwangis and collect their hammers in Mighty Frog Pond to the southwest.
Federation humans need to see that tablet!
Now everyone will know their evil plans.
Defeat Great Chief Moong and bring back his hammer.
Destroy the frog drum at Mighty Frog Pond.
I was glad to do it.
You really have been a tremendous help.
Kill tuwangi frogriders and collect their axes.
Just clear out as many as you can.
Seems like the tuwangis forgot about their protection.
Take the tokens off the tuwangi blockheads and choppers.
I was happy I could help.
Kill Battlehopper Raguga in Tuwangi Thorp and bring back his heart.
Eliminate the muddy sporewalkers, hungry cullars, and tentacullars around Tuwangi Mire.
Hunt down the tuwangis in Babok Hollow.
Hunt down the inky sabertooths in Babok Hollow.
Kill the upstart tuwangis in Tuwangi Thorp.
Speak with Prefect Daven in Lumbertown.
Report to Petrina at Two Oaks Ranch.
Defeat Smulch, who is wandering the road near Two Oaks Ranch.
Report to Petrina at Two Oaks Ranch.
Speak with Lethar at Echo Ranch.
Speak with Sozia at the outskirts of Colchester.
Thank you for saving us. We'll never forget you!
Rescue the villagers trapped inside Colchester and escort them to Sozia.
Speak with Sozia on the outskirts of Colchester.
Destroy weapon crates in Deva Silva.
I can see something inside the encampment!
I give my life for Lok...
May Lok's curses be upon you!
Defeat Ebonheart Sorcerers, Reavers of Resurrection, and the Dark Priest.
Let's get to the bottom of this.
I won't be seen anymore! I can eavesdrop now.
Kamia has already reported in to Hendry.
Use teleportal to go to Vanguard Outpost.
I'm always happy to help wherever I'm needed.
Rest, soldier. You will be avenged!
I'm sorry, friend. You deserved better.
Rest easy, soldier. Your duty is done.
Find the remaining scout who may still be alive.
I'm sorry I didn't find them sooner.
Go to {@LinkCreature:59#1013#Zinji} and ride a pegasus to Velika. Speak with Dougal in Velika Headquarters.
Bring the report to Garrison Commander Samael at Velika Headquarters.
Bring the report to Garrison Commander Samael at Velika Headquarters.
Receive reward from Samael at Velik's Steps.
Receive reward from Samael at Velik's Steps.
Report to Brose at the east gate of Lumbertown.
Deliver Kenan's Letter to Furlan at Two Oaks Ranch in the Valley of Titans.
When I get that {@RawItem:206808}, I'll be in business.
This is a big help. Thanks.
Deliver the {@RawItem:206808} to Delaile at Two Oaks Ranch.
I thank you. The cows thank you.
Collect sweet hayblossoms that grow near the ranch to feed the Two Oaks Ranch cows.
Deliver sweet hayblossoms to the rancher's wife, Fanella, at Two Oaks Ranch.
Maybe we could send some noruk meat to the refugees.
Hunt grazing noruks around Two Oaks Ranch.
Go back to Furlan at Two Oaks Ranch.
Say hello to Zackran for me.
Go to Zackran at Echo Ranch.
The more you kill, the better I'll like it.
Exterminate hyenas that prey on Echo Ranch cows.
Report to Zackran at Echo Ranch.
Those fences are in terrible shape.
Find fence repair materials in the junk box.
Find fence repair materials in the junk box.
Find fence repair materials in the junk box.
Deliver the fence repair materials to Lakhia.
Deliver the fence repair materials to Lakhia.
I can smell that meat cooking now...
Hunt stomping noruks around Echo Ranch and collect their meat.
Deliver the meat to Lethar at Echo Ranch.
Thank you for coming to help me.
Go to Dakona at Mags Strix.
Report to Lethar at Echo Ranch.
More food will do a lot for morale.
Collect sacks of supplies in Colchester.
Eliminate Gutrend kulkaris and clawtamers in the east and bring back their heads.
Just see if they need help.
Look for Othias in the southern valley.
Securing the Safety of the Militia
The fewer of them, the safer we are.
I'll try about anything to be rid of those Gutrends.
Gutrends will find nothing to eat here. They'll have to move elsewhere.
Eliminate hillwalker warthogs and scavenging bears, the Gutrends' main source of food
Speak to the adjutant of the garrison unit that has advanced to the center of Mags Kulkar.
Eliminate those Gutrend seers and juggernauts.
You did a fairly good job.
Defeat Gutrend seers and juggernauts in Mags Kulkar.
Gutrends in a panic! Very exciting news!
Visit Prefect Crevan in Vindicator Camp to report that you have eliminated the majority of the Gutrends.
Deliver the news to Whimnia on the road to Valselok Shrine.
Now we are in better situations than they are.
Eliminate Lokian reavers and Lokian mystics at Valselok Shrine.
We have to get rid of those justicars first.
Now that the justicars are gone, we can attack more easily.
Eliminate Scion justicars at Valselok Shrine.
Kill Lokian darkcallers and reapmasters at Valselok Shrine.
Eliminate Lokian darkcallers and reapmasters at Valselok Shrine.
There'll be more. There are always more.
You know the drill by now.
Collect headdresses from Gutrend brigands and pillagers in Colchester.
Deliver the Gutrend headdresses to Sozia.
Kill Gutrend brigands and pillagers in Colchester.
Hunt the ravenous bears east of Vindicator Camp.
Slay Arakia in the Valley of Titans.
Slay Arakia in the Valley of Titans.
Report to Heroth at Godric's Farm in Celestial Hills.
Find Siria in central Omphalos Plains.
Kill Kadas and retrieve his amulet.
Investigate the baetyliths in the Omphalos Plains and collect shards for Siria.
Take the shards back to Siria.
Investigate the sparking baetyliths in the Omphalos Plains and eliminate their {@LinkObject:45#protectors}.
Report to Mattin at the Sanctum Mysterium.
Find Padraig near the Cardovek Remnants.
Kill Lokian sorcerers to recover cryptographs.
Kill a Lokian berserker in the Cardovek Remnants and recover a Decryption Device.
No, I lost the Decryption Device.
Yes, I have the Decryption Device.
Decrypt the messages and return to Padraig.
The decryption is taken care of.
Use the Decryption Device on the cryptographs and deliver the decrypted message to Padraig.
Find Tezluar in the Cardovek Remnants and kill him.
Report to Mysterium researcher Padraig at Cardovek Remnants.
Report to Mattin at the Sanctum Mysterium.
It is done. The defense shield is active.
Speak with Mattin and teleport together. Speak with Mattin again and defend him from attack.
Speak with Mattin at the Sanctum Mysterium.
Go to Dougal at Velika Headquarters.
Bring Mattin's report to Garrison Commander Samael at Velika Headquarters.
Even one fighter can make a difference.
You're all the reinforcements we need.
Exit through the east gate of Lumbertown and report to Prefect Drustan at Casidhe's Stand of Celestial Hills in the southeast.
Kill the orcans beseiging Casidhe's Stand and tear their fangs out.
You'll make a big difference to them.
Head south from Casidhe's Stand and deliver the supply package to Heroth at Godric's Farm.
Kill naga mercenaries southeast of Godric's Farm.
Kill naga mercenaries southeast of Godric's Farm.
Getting a Head in the World
Kill and collect the heads from naga juggernauts in Omphalos Plains.
Kill Naga Warlord Nakarash and collect a fragment from his armor.
Deliver the naga scale to Onumak.
Deliver the fragment to Mattin at Sanctum Mysterium.
Take a bite out of them.
Fewer than there used to be. That's a victory.
Thin out the hyenas east of Sanctum Mysterium.
Report to Donal at Sanctum Mysterium.
I'm a Scholar Not a Soldier, Jim
Take them out. Buy us some research time.
Now we can go to work.
Kill bloodguards from the Scions of Lok in Cardovek Remnants east of Sanctum Mysterium.
Report to Elthim at Sanctum Mysterium.
At least we can hope to slow them down.
They'll be a while catching up after this.
Steal toolboxes from the Cardovek Remnants to hinder the Scions of Lok.
The more you kill now, the better for us later.
Kill Lokian lancers and berserkers in Cardovek Remnants.
Report to Donal at Sanctum Mysterium.
Dead nagas are the best nagas.
Let's see how the cultists like that.
Kill juggernaut mercenaries in Cardovek Remnants.
Report to Prefect Nale at Sanctum Mysterium.
Get selective reward item, Kaia's binding from repeatable quest.
Bring Kaia's binding to Dougal in Velika HQ.
Proof of Kill: Red Fang Deaths
Eliminate the Red Fang orcans and fighters near Casidhe's Stand.
Eliminate Red Fang ragers near Godric's Farm.
Hunt indolent or torpid kumases around the Omphalos Plains.
Hunt the Lokian lancers and berserkers in the Cardovek Remnants.
Eliminate the juggernaut mercenaries in the eastern Cardovek Remnants.
Slay Barraq in the Celestial Hills.
Slay Barraq in the Celestial Hills.
Report to Fraya at Allemantheia Headquarters.&#xA[Speak with {@linkcreature:72#1103#Arshadh} to enter the Allemantheia Headquarters.]
Go to Velika and find Priestess Ciebel at Velik's Steps.
Meet with Elleon in Castanica in Ostgarath Province.
Speak with Commander Fraya in Castanica.
Go to the Hungry Caverns and find Smernav at the Avenger Outpost.&#xA[Use the {@linkcreature:61#1009#Teleportal} to go to Avenger Outpost.]
Kill Dulinka and his mekkitars at the southern end of the Cavern of Shackles.&#xA[Use the elevator or speak with {@linkcreature:208#2000#Tadan} to go to Hungry Caverns Vaults.]

Chapter 1: Continental Expedition

This echo seems to relate to the Dark Continent Expedition.

Join the Dark Continent Expedition to restore the Echo Arcana.

Chapter 1: Continental Expedition

Follow Syona, Ribina, and Randun to learn why the Dark Continent Expedition is here.
A beam of light shines from deep inside Castle Aranea.

Chapter 1: Continental Expedition

Find a way into Castle Aranea with the Dark Continent Expedition.

Chapter 2: Devan Prisoner

Follow the Dark Continent Expedition into the Monstrous Arena.

Chapter 2: Devan Prisoner

Defeat Greandale with Syona and Ribina.

Chapter 3: Two Paths

Nemato knows what the Dark Continent Expedition is looking for.

Listen to Nemato's story.

Chapter 3: Two Paths

If you go with Syona, it leads underground, and if you go with Randun, it leads to the castle grounds.

Select who you want to go with, and move to that entrance.

Chapter 4: Sub-Devans

Nemato speaks of a place where sub-devans like him live under the castle.

Follow Nemato with Syona.

Chapter 4: Sub-Devans

There's the distinctive odor of sewage. How can sub-devans live in such a place?

Keep following Nemato.

Chapter 4: Sub-Devans

Nemato points to the Slave Pens where the sub-devans stay. Nemato explains how bad Imperial Puppets are.

Enter the Slave Pens and defeat all Imperial Puppets.
It seems there are corpses in the castle sewers.

Chapter 4: Sub-Devans

Syona is grim after seeing how the sub-devans live. Nemato seems not to be bothered and is providing guidance again.

Follow Nemato with Syona.

Chapter 4: Sub-Devans

Syona is distracted by an implement of blood magic after seeing the piles of sub-devan corpses. Continue alone until Syona finishes her investigation.

Follow the path up.

Chapter 5: Chamber Secrets

Tools for torture and blood stains litter the floor. Two torturers approach with a smile.

Defeat Sereken and Masuki and escape the Torture Chamber.

Chapter 5: Chamber Secrets

Get as far as possible from the Torture Chamber before another torturer shows up.

Follow Nemato.

Chapter 5: Chamber Secrets

Nemato says there's a secret door that leads to Anea's Palace at the top of the stairs. It seems the archdevans like to stay near their toys.

Go to the top of the stairs.

Chapter 5: Chamber Secrets

If Nemato is right, Anea's Palace should be behind this wall.

Find and operate the lever, then exit via the secret door.

Chapter 4: Scholarly Pursuit

Excited after hearing about a new weapon, Randun promptly disappeared from sight. There must be an elevator nearby.

Ride the elevator.

Chapter 4: Scholarly Pursuit

Randun's voice echoes down from above.
Found an empty space in Castle Aranea.

Chapter 4: Scholarly Pursuit

Get off the elevator and join Randun.

Chapter 4: Scholarly Pursuit

Be careful: Nearby soldiers will converge if we're spotted by an archdevan archer with night vision.

Avoid the archdevan archers and move to the Weapons Lab.

Chapter 5: War Machine

Randun's spotted the weapon he wanted to see.

Examine the War Crawler weapon.

Chapter 5: War Machine

Randun made a mess of things. Make things right before archdevans arrive.

Defeat the War Crawler.

Chapter 5: War Machine

Randun found the weapon designs. It's dangerous to move Randun when he has designs on the brain, so it's better to continue alone like he suggested.

Exit the Weapons Lab and look for Anea's Palace.

Chapter 5: War Machine

The palace is like a fortress. Its exterior is strong and well decorated.

Enter the Throne Room.

Chapter 6: Secret Power

You've reached the Throne Room. No time to wait for the dark continent expedition to join.

Defeat Commander Heskia.

Chapter 6: Secret Power

Finally arrived at the Queen's Chamber, where Nemato claimed to see what the Dark Continent Expedition were seeking.

Enter the Queen's Chamber.

Chapter 7: Nemato

Anea (or Aranea) continued to blame people right up until she died. Does this have something to do with what Nemato did?

Chapter 7: Changed Man

The expedition senses the strangeness of Nemato's actions.

Move to where Nemato disappeared.

Chapter 7: Changed Man

The map the expedition was looking for must be in this crate.

Destroy the crate.

Chapter 7: Changed Man

It seems most of the memory was restored.

Chapter 7: Changed Man

The Echo Arcana reappeared. There must be a change in it.

Take a closer look.

Chapter 7: Changed Man

Go back to your time and tell the barakas what memories you restored so far.
